description: Dashboard metric card with formatted value.

sql.description: DuckDB SQL with {{udf_name}} and $param_name placeholders. Returns first column of first row.

format.description: How to format the number. "compact" abbreviates large values (e.g. 1.2M, 45.3K, 2.5B). "comma" adds thousand separators (e.g. 1,234,567). "none" displays the raw value as-is.

size.description: Font size of the number in pixels. e.g. 24, 36, 48, 72, 96, 144. Default 36.
